description.value:
Requirements You're wielding two weapons, at least one of which is a sawtooth saber.

Your sawtooth saber training enables you to pin down an enemy using your twin blades. Make a Strike with each weapon against the same creature. If you deal sneak attack damage, you can immediately attempt to [[/act grapple]] the creature, even if you don't have a hand free. If you dealt damage with both Strikes, your multiple attack penalty is not applied to the Grapple attempt.
